title: Heterostemma andersonii
taxonomy: Heterostemma andersonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This family is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The Apocynaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, including many species of vines, shrubs, and trees. Members of the Apocynaceae family are typically characterized by their showy flowers and milky sap. Heterostemma andersonii is a part of the tribe Plumerieae within the Apocynaceae family.
